userOutcome: Team command includes explicit anti-pattern guidance so agents avoid TaskOutput fabrication, worktree conflicts, and manual git worktree removal.
scopeSummary: Add anti-pattern prohibitions with architectural rationale to .claude/commands/team.md. No code changes needed — fix is command guidance only.
risks: team.md word budget (~400 words) may require trimming existing content to fit new guidance
readinessReason: Research completed. Decisions documented in CONTEXT.json. Scope is one file edit.
handoffSummary: Edit .claude/commands/team.md to add prohibitions: (1) no TaskOutput for foreground team agents, (2) no composite name@team_name IDs, (3) no isolation:worktree on Task tool, (4) no manual git worktree remove. Each with architectural rationale.
